block_00: What really affects the price of Bitcoin?
block_01: You already know that the law of supply and demand affects the BTC price, just as any other asset out there.
block_02: Changes in regulation can also move the price of Bitcoin and its younger peers — to a certain degree.
block_03: What are the other 3 factors that affect the price of the world’s most popular cryptocurrency?
